name: predictability-index-system
description: Predictability Index System — Enterprise Formulation Analysis Platform

scripts.build: yarn workspace @amfpi/shared build && yarn workspace @amfpi/main-server build && yarn workspace @amfpi/dashboard build
scripts.verify:env:dev: yarn workspace @amfpi/main-server verify:env:dev && yarn workspace @amfpi/dashboard verify:env:dev
scripts.verify:env:staging: yarn workspace @amfpi/main-server verify:env:staging && yarn workspace @amfpi/dashboard verify:env:staging
scripts.verify:env:production: yarn workspace @amfpi/main-server verify:env:production && yarn workspace @amfpi/dashboard verify:env:production
scripts.type-check: yarn workspace @amfpi/main-server type-check && yarn workspace @amfpi/dashboard type-check
